name: EK PRAYASS
description:
Ek Prayass is the social welfare club of KIET, dedicated to building a culture of social responsibility among students. The club aims to bridge the gap between education and social welfare by organizing impactful initiatives that address the needs of marginalized communities. Also, striving to eradicate tobacco use and fight addiction in the community, working toward creating healthier, addiction-free environments.

Through diverse activities such as educational workshops, cleanliness drives, awareness programs, and community visits, Ek Prayass fosters values of empathy, teamwork, and leadership.The club emphasizes holistic development by encouraging students to not only excel academically but also contribute to society meaningfully.

By collaborating with local schools, villages, and national - level initiatives like Unnat Bharat Abhiyan, Ek Prayass has created sustainable change.The spirit of service lies at the heart of the club’s mission, where each member contributes “one effort” towards uplifting society.With a vision to nurture compassionate professionals and responsible citizens, Ek Prayass continues to inspire and empower young minds to take collective steps for a brighter and inclusive future.
